instruction:
We now define an algorithm: The definition of a(n) is the difference between n^2 and the largest prime less than n^2. Given the input x_list (a series of values): [89, 90, 91, 92, 93, 94, 95, 96, 97, 98], determine the corresponding output sequence y_list.

Options:
A. [5, 7, 4, 4, 6, 9, 11, 8, 3, 2]
B. [6, 5, 5, 1, 7, 4, 7, 2, 1, 4]
C. [7, 3, 6, 6, 2, 2, 5, 5, 5, 5]
D. [9, 4, 7, 7, 1, 1, 3, 4, 4, 1]
E. [1, 6, 3, 2, 4, 8, 10, 3, 7, 6]
F. [2, 7, 8, 3, 2, 5, 12, 7, 6, 3]
G. [4, 8, 2, 5, 3, 6, 9, 5, 4, 4]
H. [3, 9, 1, 4, 5, 7, 8, 6, 2, 5]
I. [8, 2, 9, 5, 8, 3, 6, 9, 6, 7]
J. [1, 1, 10, 9, 2, 10, 2, 3, 9, 8]
